results.title: JavaScript Course for Beginners – Your First Step to Web Development
results.reason: Mosh is highly praised in comments for his 'no-fluff' approach and logical progression from variables to functions.
summary: Learn how to set up your coding environment
Understand how to store data using variables
Write basic instructions for the web browser
Build simple functions to perform specific tasks

results.title: JavaScript Tutorial for Beginners [JS Crash Course]
results.reason: The 97-minute duration allows for deep explanations of the 'why', making it the most comprehensive educational choice.
summary: Master the core building blocks of programming
Learn how to organize and group information
Create logic to make decisions in code
Connect your code to a real website

results.title: JavaScript tutorial for beginners 🌐
results.reason: Excellent step-by-step setup instructions in the transcript make it the most accessible entry point for absolute novices.
summary: Get a quick introduction to coding basics
Display messages and interact with the user
Perform math and handle numbers in code
Start writing your very first script today

results.title: 100+ JavaScript Concepts you Need to Know
results.reason: While popular, the high-speed delivery of 100 concepts is often cited as overwhelming for true beginners.
summary: Explore a wide map of modern coding ideas
Understand how the language works behind scenes
Learn the names of important industry tools
Discover advanced features used by professional developers

results.title: JavaScript Tutorial for Beginners - Learn in 15 Minutes ( Crash Course 2026 )
results.reason: A well-paced modern crash course that viewers appreciate for its updated 2024/2025 context.
summary: Learn the most essential parts very fast
Understand how to change text on pages
Write code that reacts when buttons click
Get a high-level view of web development
